title: Kai Neraya Kannadi Lyrics Attu
stanzas:
Kai neraya kannadi
valaiyal saththam
en kanavula kannathula
thaariye muththam.

indha areavil yaarum illa
penne unnaattam
nee asathuriye hindi
padam heroin-aattam

kolusu gulpu kaattudhu
valayal valachi poduthu
dhinusa retta sada
pinnal katti ilukkudhu

mookkuthi morachi paakkuthu
jimikki aattam poduthu
thalukkaa neththi pottu
enna suttu thalludhu.

color-u milk-u white-u ma
kannan tubelight-u maa
udhadu halwa sweetu maa
moththamaa enakku
kedaikkumaa...

aathen abaesh pannitaa
sharpaa saanaa pudichituaa
salpi mittaayathaan
gulphi ice-a aakkittaa

ye Kai neraya kannadi
valaiyal saththam
en kanavula kannathula
thaariye muththam.

indha areavil yaarum illa
penne unnaattam
nee asathuriye hindi
padam heroin-aattam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kai Neraya Kannadi?

The song is an energetic and peppy number that celebrates youthful exuberance and joy.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Hyde Karty and Sindhal Sedhu.

Who composed the music for Attu?

The music for the movie Attu was composed by Bobo Shashi.

What is the release year of the song?

The song was released in 2017.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song appears in a lively sequence, adding energy and excitement to the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kai Neraya Kannadi is an energetic track from the movie Attu, featuring the lively vocals of Hyde Karty and Sindhal Sedhu. The song captures a vibrant and youthful atmosphere, perfect for party scenes and celebrations. With its catchy beats and dynamic rhythm, it adds a burst of energy to the film. The lyrics, penned by Yuki Praveen, complement the upbeat music composed by Bobo Shashi, making it a memorable addition to the soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kai Neraya Kannadi from the movie Attu is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With the dynamic vocals of Hyde Karty and Sindhal Sedhu, combined with Bobo Shashi's pulsating beats, this song is a perfect party anthem. Dive into the lively world of Attu and experience the magic of this unique collaboration.
stanzaMeanings: The sound of bangles fills my dreams, and you give me a kiss on my cheek.
In this area, there's no one else, girl. You dance like a Hindi movie heroine.
The anklet jingles, the bangles spin, the braid swings back and forth.
The nose ring shines, the earrings dance, the forehead dot dazzles me.
Your skin is milky white, your lips are sweet like halwa. Will I get you completely?
She cast a spell, caught me sharply, turned the ice into sweet candy.
The sound of bangles fills my dreams, and you give me a kiss on my cheek.
In this area, there's no one else, girl. You dance like a Hindi movie heroine.
